description: Replace 200-bar SMA regime filter with ATR regime (already in entry); relaxes over-constrained entry stack to prevent 0-trade crashes on 4h crypto data.

Crash diagnosis: The strategy is over-filtered with 4 stacked entry conditions (Donchian breakout + ATR regime gate + volume confirmation + ADX momentum), all of which must fire simultaneously on ever

Remove volume confirmation filter — crypto 24/7 markets have irregular volume patterns that cause the rolling-SMA filter to reject valid breakout bars independently of the other three entry conditions

Drop ADX momentum filter entirely — the intersection of Donchian breakout + ATR regime gate + ADX momentum confirmation produces 0 trades on 1h crypto data. The ATR volatility gate alone is sufficient

Aggressive simplification: remove 3 stacked entry filters (SMA regime, ADX momentum, volume confirmation) that have caused 6 consecutive 0-trade crashes. Keep only Donchian breakout + ATR regime gate;
